overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian city at dusk. The scene transitions from a palm-lined avenue with hanging banners to a water feature with sphinx statues, then to a temple entrance with hieroglyphic columns and covered corridors, all illuminated by torchlight as night falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined ceremonial avenue with hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main avenue, passing by civilians and admiring the architecture

notable_agents.action: civilian in yellow robes walking alongside the path

entered.detail: tall date palms lining both sides of the avenue
red and gold fabric banners strung across the street
black patterned ceramic planter with palm tree
multi-story mud-brick building with green and red painted details
tall iron brazier with burning fire

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide ceremonial avenue lined with tall palm trees and decorative banners. The scene is set during the blue hour with soft natural light, featuring ancient Egyptian architecture with painted details and burning torches. Sparse pedestrians in period clothing walk along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walkway along elevated temple wall

events.description: turns right from main avenue toward water feature along stone wall
ambient light fades significantly as torchlight becomes the primary illumination

agents.ego_description: turns right and walks along a stone wall, approaching a water feature with large buildings in the background

entered.detail: tall sandstone retaining wall with crenellated top
rectangular pool of water reflecting torchlight
large stone temple building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a narrower path alongside a tall stone wall, leaving the main avenue behind. The lighting transitions from dusk to night as they approach a water feature. Large temple buildings become visible in the background, illuminated by torchlight against the darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sacred pool with lily pads and sphinx statues

events.description: arrives at water pool with lily pads and views sphinx statues across the water
night fully sets with dark blue sky and stars becoming visible

agents.ego_description: pauses to observe the water feature and sphinx statues, panning the camera to take in the view

entered.detail: green lily pads with pink flowers floating on the water surface
large dark stone sphinx statue with glowing red eyes
tall stone obelisk silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sacred water feature at night, the pool filled with lily pads and surrounded by stone walls. Across the water, large sphinx statues with glowing red eyes line the opposite bank, illuminated by numerous torches. An obelisk stands tall against the dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple garden path with flowering bushes and hieroglyphic columns

events.description: encounters NPC in white hooded robes walking toward the camera
approaches temple entrance with illuminated hieroglyphic columns

agents.ego_description: walks along a garden path toward a temple entrance, passing an NPC in white robes

notable_agents.action: civilian in white hooded robes walking toward the camera on the path

entered.detail: dense green bushes with red flowers lining the path
tall stone column covered in illuminated hieroglyphic carvings
grand doorway flanked by decorated columns and burning braziers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a garden path lined with flowering bushes and palm trees, encountering an NPC in white robes. The path leads toward an impressive temple entrance flanked by massive columns covered in illuminated hieroglyphics, with burning braziers lighting the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with hieroglyphic columns and fabric canopy corridor

events.description: enters covered corridor with hanging fabric canopies and suspended lanterns

agents.ego_description: walks through the temple entrance and into a covered corridor with hanging fabrics

entered.detail: large wooden door with metal studs and hieroglyphic lintel
white fabric drapes hanging across the corridor ceiling
bronze oil lamp suspended from the canopy
decorated stone walls with painted reliefs

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through the grand doorway, passing between massive hieroglyphic columns. Inside, the space becomes a covered corridor draped with white fabric canopies and illuminated by hanging bronze lanterns. The stone walls feature detailed painted reliefs as the character proceeds deeper into the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through an ancient Egyptian city as the soft light of dusk deepens into a torchlit night. It begins along a wide ceremonial avenue lined with palm trees and decorative banners under a blue hour sky, before the camera turns right onto a narrower path beside a tall stone wall. As the natural light fades, the scene shifts toward a sacred water feature where lily pads float in a pool and sphinxes with glowing red eyes stand beneath a towering obelisk. The movement then continues along a garden path of flowering bushes toward a grand temple entrance flanked by massive, illuminated hieroglyphic columns. Finally, the camera passes through the doorway into a covered corridor draped with white fabric canopies and lit by hanging bronze lanterns, moving deeper into the structure past detailed painted reliefs.
